title: Cuneiform Tablet #0127: Achaemenid Medical
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Achaemenid period — a medical document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Achaemenid period — a medical document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Achaemenid period. Medical document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records medical matters typical of Achaemenid period administrative or literary practice.
